title: High-End 4× RTX 5090 — Threadripper AI Workstation
subtitle: 128GB VRAM · Threadripper 7960X · 256GB DDR5 ECC · all-new, money-no-object contrast to the used-3090 value builds · prices a 2026-06-26 snapshot — edit / autofill to refresh

rows.name: GPU (each)
rows.spec: RTX 5090 32GB ×4 = 128GB VRAM (Blackwell). June-2026 AIB street ~$2,900 (ASUS TUF) to $3,300.
rows.flag: street price — high markup vs $1,999 MSRP

rows.name: CPU
rows.spec: AMD Threadripper 7960X (Zen4, 24c/48t, sTR5). Quad-channel+ DDR5, 88 PCIe 5.0 lanes — real x16 to every GPU.

rows.name: RAM
rows.spec: 256GB DDR5-5600 ECC RDIMM (4×64GB) — feeds CPU-offload of big-MoE experts.

rows.name: PSU
rows.spec: 1600W 80+ Titanium (4× 5090 ≈ 2.3kW peak — may need dual-PSU or 240V).

rows.name: Case + cooling
rows.spec: Full-tower / open frame for 4× triple-slot 5090s + Threadripper AIO. Airflow is the hard part.
